title: Junior Frontend Developer at Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
We at Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Frontend Developer based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates:
Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates!
